This paper will be used to summarize existing literature (Category 1), highlight the gap between academic benchmarks and production reality (Category 5), and support arguments about non-model-centric failure modes (Category 7). The most critical starting citation is the seminal work on hidden technical debt in ML systems, which provides the necessary theoretical and practical backdrop for discussing modern deep learning failures in production environments.
